---
title: "Phase 2: Pharmacogenomic Genotyping"
description: "CYP2C19-primary / CYP2D6-exploratory star allele calling from
  SMRI SNP arrays using PharmCAT, generating continuous activity scores for
  105 brains."
date: 2026-04-15
image: "/images/Phase 2.png"
---

## Overview

CYP2C19 and CYP2D6 star allele calling from SMRI Affymetrix SNP 5.0 data using
PharmCAT. Implements a **CYP2C19-primary / CYP2D6-secondary** strategy — CYP2C19
is reliably called from SNP arrays, while CYP2D6 is exploratory due to
structural variation (deletions, duplications, CYP2D7 hybrids) invisible to arrays.

**Timeline:** Weeks 3–5

## Methods

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
